mapper.update: UPDATE seller_account SET frozen_amount = frozen_amount + #{amount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE seller_id = #{sellerId}
UPDATE seller_account SET balance = balance + #{amount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE seller_id = #{sellerId}
UPDATE seller_account SET total_income = total_income + #{amount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE seller_id = #{sellerId}
UPDATE seller_account SET total_withdraw = total_withdraw + #{amount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE seller_id = #{sellerId}
